valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Fri 20 Feb 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 21 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: New low expected southwest Bailey 990 by 1800 Friday. High Trafalgar 1030 expected south Biscay 1032 by same time. Low Hebrides 995 losing its identity
